analysis: APF likely intercepted (HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR + dynamic-import failures match a TLS/connection-reset pattern from MITM block), but the warning bubble does NOT render in Genspark's chat thread. Instead the page shows generic 'Failed to load component' fallbacks. Same regression class as zeta v2.2.3-REBUILT REGRESSION_text_no_render (iter 3 #864) — the {{ESCAPE2:MESSAGE}} JSON-safe escape that fixed zeta (#865 OK) did NOT carry over to genspark. Genspark's frontend (Nuxt SPA) appears to handle stream-truncation differently from zeta; the injected warning either fails JSON parsing in Genspark's stream handler or is dropped by the component-level error boundary.
next_iter_hint: Compare HAR/stream-shape between zeta vs genspark APF intercept response. Genspark may need component-level injection (DOM/error-boundary bypass) rather than stream-message escape. Re-inspect frontend (Phase 4) for genspark.
